---
title: "PRAMS ARF Processing and Cleaning"
author: "Alexandra Tejada-Strop"
date: "2026-02-23"
format: html
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Packages
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(here)

raw_path <- here("data", "raw-data", "prams_arf.xlsx")
raw <- read_xlsx(raw_path)
```

## Load Data
```{r}
raw_path <- here("data", "raw-data", "prams_arf.xlsx")
raw_path
file.exists(raw_path)

raw <- readxl::read_xlsx(raw_path)
glimpse(raw)
```

## Explore Data
```{r}
miss_tbl <- raw |>
  summarise(across(everything(), ~ mean(is.na(.x)))) |>
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "variable", values_to = "pct_missing") |>
  arrange(desc(pct_missing))

head(miss_tbl, 20)

raw |>
  summarise(
    n_rows = n(),
    n_cols = ncol(raw)
  )
```

## Clean Data
```{r} 
dat <- raw |>
  rename_with(stringr::str_squish) |>
  mutate(across(where(is.character), stringr::str_squish)) |>
  distinct()
```

## Save Data
```{r}
dir.create(here("data", "processed-data"), showWarnings = FALSE)
saveRDS(dat, here("data", "processed-data", "prams_clean.rds"))
```
